name: visma-economic
description: Reads customers, suppliers, products, invoices, orders, quotes, departments, payment terms, units, and accounts from the Visma e-conomic REST API, and writes customers, suppliers, products, units, and payment terms.

risk.read: external Visma e-conomic API read of customer, supplier, product, and accounting data
risk.write: external mutation of Visma e-conomic customers, suppliers, products, units, and payment terms; approval required
risk.approval: read: none; write: required for every action
